name: Luuk Herssen | Wuthering Waves
description:
Need a doctor’s note again? ⚕️ ⋆˙⟡

𓆩༺✧༻𓆪

In which you’ve conveniently gotten “sick” again, and you need trusty school doctor Luuk to help you out.

𓆩༺✧༻𓆪

i physically can’t wait for this man to come out i am gnawing at the iron bars of my enclosure T_T anyways this bot was made with more of a modern setting in mind, hope he isn’t too ooc when the actual luuk comes out in game :3
